- `seal:unsealed`

- `trigger:goodwill is the residual, not an input вЂ” IFRS 3 В§32 computes it as consideration + NCI + previously-held interest в€’ fair value of identifiable net assets, so an acquisition's PPA must allocate to every asset/liability first and goodwill is whatever is left ([[accounting]] double-entry).`
